recommendations.title: Arrival
recommendations.overview: Taking place after alien crafts land around the world, an expert linguist is recruited by the military to determine whether they come in peace or are a threat.

recommendations.title: The Man from the Future

recommendations.title: New Gods: Nezha Reborn
recommendations.overview: While living as an ordinary deliveryman and motor racing fan, Nezha encounters old nemeses and must rediscover his powers to protect his loved ones.

recommendations.title: anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day - The Movie
recommendations.overview: A year has passed since Menma's ghostly return to the Super Peace Busters. Although the time they spent together during that summer was short, the five members reminisce about what happened as they each write a letter to their lost friend.

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
recommendations.overview: When an attack on the Kingsman headquarters takes place and a new villain rises, Eggsy and Merlin are forced to work together with the American agency known as the Statesman to save the world.

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.

recommendations.title: Hotel Rwanda

recommendations.title: Smash and Grab
recommendations.overview: After years of toiling away inside the engine room of a towering locomotive, two antiquated robots will risk everything for freedom and for each other.
